effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout_style

rule_text: There are three approved callout styles; use them judiciously and never place two of the same style competing on one screen/section.
intent: Prevent visual repetition and preserve callout hierarchy.
summary: Use three approved callout styles judiciously, never place two identical styles competing in one screen/section.
